episode_title: GPT-5.6 moves AI closer to everyday work
selected_story_title: OpenAI pushes GPT‑5.6 toward real work
selection_reason: This is the biggest practical story of the edition because it signals a shift from AI as a novelty to AI as a work utility. It affects creators and small teams across drafting, research, coding, and routine operations, and it is backed by a direct product announcement with clear claims to verify.
first_spoken_line: Today’s biggest story is OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 announcement, because it points to a very practical shift: models are being sold less as clever demos and more as work tools.
final_spoken_line: If you want the shortest version of today’s advice, it is this: do not ask whether the model is impressive. Ask whether it makes one real task faster, cleaner, and easier to repeat. That is the standard that matters now.
